text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm training with El Condor Pasa, when...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Agh... My eyes are killin' me.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I was watchin' wrestling all night! I was so caught
up in it, I didn't realize how late it was! Haha!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But you know what? The wrestlers' combo
techniques were insane!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! I'm not asleep! My mind just couldn't keep
up with my body!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She won't admit it, but she's clearly exhausted
from watching those late-night matches.
